GGP.note: Greatland Resources announced a 62% group ore reserve upgrade to 5.0Moz gold this week — the type of 'pre-move' catalyst where the announcement is fresh and the
GGP.name: Greatland Resources
GGP.narrative: Greatland Resources announced a 62% group ore reserve upgrade to 5.0Moz gold this week — the type of 'pre-move' catalyst where the announcement is fresh and the gold sector is rallying. Macquarie maintains Outperform with A$14.00 target vs current ~A$12.01 = 16.6% upside. Gold recovering above $4,000 after Q2's record quarterly drop provides sector tailwind. Company has $1.2B cash. Havieron FID approval confirms the production ramp is on track.

KCN.name: Kingsgate Consolidated
KCN.narrative: Kingsgate Consolidated led the entire ASX 200 with a +4.5% gain on Friday as gold miners dominated the top-10 list. Gold is recovering above $4,000 after its steepest quarterly drop on record in Q2 2026. End-of-quarter selling pressure is now complete — Q3 should see systematic re-rating of gold miners. KCN as an ASX 200 member benefits from index rebalancing flows too.

TLX.name: Telix Pharmaceuticals
TLX.narrative: Telix Pharmaceuticals holds an unchanged thesis: the ARTMS deal locks in isotope supply security for 5 years, the 12.92% short position creates squeeze potential, and the August 2026 earnings event approaches. Analyst target of $23.73 represents 48% upside from current levels. No fresh catalyst today — maintain and accumulate on dips.

NEM.note: Newmont is the world's largest gold producer and the purest large-cap instrument for a gold recovery trade. With 30 analysts maintaining a Buy consensus and ave
NEM.name: Newmont Corporation
NEM.narrative: Newmont is the world's largest gold producer and the purest large-cap instrument for a gold recovery trade. With 30 analysts maintaining a Buy consensus and average target of $140.65 (45% upside from ~$94), NEM is deeply undervalued relative to sell-side consensus. Gold recovering from Q2's record quarterly drop into Q3 is the direct catalyst. Last confirmed price June 24 — verify live.

MU.note: Micron's Q3 earnings beat was one of the strongest in semiconductor history: EPS +24.3% above estimates, and Q4 guidance $50B versus $43.58B analyst estimate —
MU.name: Micron Technology
MU.narrative: Micron's Q3 earnings beat was one of the strongest in semiconductor history: EPS +24.3% above estimates, and Q4 guidance $50B versus $43.58B analyst estimate — a guide-up that eliminates the bear case. US market is open today (Tuesday). This is an earnings-driven momentum play with a clear target.

AVGO.name: Broadcom Inc
AVGO.narrative: Broadcom is the critical infrastructure layer for AI compute — ASIC chips for hyperscalers, AI accelerators, networking silicon. The analyst consensus is near-unanimous (score 4.04 from 56 analysts). At $374.51, this is a multi-year AI infrastructure play. Target $460 with stop at $335.
